---
title: "Model QC"
subtitle: |
  `r params$baseline_run_id` <-> `r params$comp_run_id`
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
params:
  run_id: "2026-02-11-recursing-rob"
---

{{< include data_changes.qmd >}}

{{< include continuous.qmd >}}

{{< include categorical.qmd >}}

{{< include missingness.qmd >}}
